str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - limited-access-to-resources
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Overcoming the Challenges of Being a Minority in Tech
entry.summary: In this 8000-word blog post, we explore the challenges facing minorities in the tech industry and provide strategies for overcoming them. From lack of representation to cultural barriers and imposter syndrome, we delve into the unique challenges faced by underrepresented groups in tech, drawing on personal experiences and research to provide practical advice and insights. We also address topics such as mental health challenges, limited access to resources, and hostile work environments, while highlighting successful examples of minorities who have overcome these obstacles to make a significant impact in the industry. Our hope is that this post will raise awareness and understanding of the challenges facing underrepresented groups in tech, inspire action and change within organizations and communities, and promote a more inclusive and diverse tech landscape for all.
